description: Style Noteforce 10 shoe for men - stylish upper with a tough masculine structuring makes for a great looking shoe that provides optimal performance on the track, in the gym or on the field. Product DetailsBeige shoe with central lace-ups, synthetic overlays and mesh inlaysMeshed and padded tongue and innerFoamy rubber midsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs Material and CareSynthetic, meshDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
